content.body:
Fixes two bugs found during v0.7.0 multi-repo rollout:

1. Nil pointer dereference when default_profile doesn't exist in
   DefaultProfiles() — adds fallback to "general-manager" in both
   init.go and upgrade.go (#57)

2. v0.6.0 configs using "owner:" YAML key lose user settings during
   migration — adds Owner field to legacyConfig and copies to User
   when User fields are empty. Also maps old "generalist" profile
   name to "general-manager" (#58)

Closes #57
Closes #58

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: fix: resolve upgrade migration bugs — nil profile panic + owner→user settings loss
